mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, user_type AS userType, token_hash AS tokenHash, expires_at AS expiresAt, is_revoked AS isRevoked, revoked_at AS revokedAt, last_used_at AS lastUsedAt, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM refresh_token WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND user_type = #{userType} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1

SELECT id, user_id AS userId, user_type AS userType, token_hash AS tokenHash, expires_at AS expiresAt, is_revoked AS isRevoked, revoked_at AS revokedAt, last_used_at AS lastUsedAt, create_time AS createTime, update_time AS updateTime, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM refresh_token WHERE token_hash = #{refreshHash} AND is_deleted = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO refresh_token ( user_id, user_type, token_hash, expires_at, is_revoked, revoked_at, last_used_at ) VALUES ( #{refreshToken.userId}, #{refreshToken.userType}, #{refreshToken.tokenHash}, #{refreshToken.expiresAt}, #{refreshToken.isRevoked}, #{refreshToken.revokedAt}, #{refreshToken.lastUsedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE refresh_token SET token_hash = #{refreshToken.tokenHash}, expires_at = #{refreshToken.expiresAt}, is_revoked = #{refreshToken.isRevoked}, revoked_at = #{refreshToken.revokedAt}, last_used_at = #{refreshToken.lastUsedAt} WHERE id = #{refreshToken.id} AND is_deleted = 0
UPDATE refresh_token SET is_revoked = 1, revoked_at = NOW() WHERE token_hash = #{tokenHash} AND is_deleted = 0
